nodes.label: Audio In
nodes.description: Input audio signal (one or more channels)

nodes.label: Delay Line
nodes.description: Non-interpolating circular buffer delay. One delay line per channel reads from an integer sample offset behind the write head.

nodes.label: DelayTime
nodes.description: Delay duration in milliseconds (0-1000). Quantised to integer samples internally.

nodes.label: FadeTime
nodes.description: Crossfade length in samples (0-1024) when delay time changes, to avoid clicks.
